name: trailblaze
description: Trailblaze: build and run a second brain (LLM-maintained personal wiki).

plugins.name: trailblaze
plugins.description: Your second brain: an LLM-maintained personal wiki based on Andrej Karpathy's LLM-Wiki pattern. One skill scaffolds the vault; ingest, query, and vault-lint keep it compounding.

plugins.name: trailblaze-grid
plugins.description: A live 3D mind-graph of your Markdown vault, lit in real time as a Claude Code agent reads and edits your notes. Notes are planets, wikilinks are orbits, and the agent's attention walks the graph as a path of light.
